name: GitHub repositories should not have open secret scanning alerts
description: Repositories with open GitHub secret scanning alerts
body:
### Security intent

This control flags repositories where GitHub reports open secret scanning alerts.

### Assessment context

Open secret scanning alerts can indicate exposed credentials or tokens in source code or repository history. Cyscale assesses the repository as failing while GitHub reports at least one open secret scanning alert.
remediationDescription:
## Remediation

Treat exposed secrets as compromised. Revoke or rotate the credential, remove it from code and history where practical, and close the GitHub secret scanning alert after confirming the secret can no longer be used.
